data.body: 18f9 final validation after strong-tier correction: held-out 9/9 GREEN, supplementary live scc skipped; metrics suite 70 passed, 1 skipped; make lint PASS; make typecheck PASS (372 source files); make test PASS 7007 passed, 29 skipped, 113 deselected. Five-axis review APPROVE: fail-closed parsing, config-shaped deterministic roots including [] fallback, argv list avoids shell injection, analyzers package stays independent of grounding, no dependency/performance blocker. TokenSave simplification scan found no duplication, dead introductions, complexity, or coupling warnings.
